_meta.description: Response tag normalization map for JANSA VISASIST. Editable. Each key is the exact raw value from column AE (after trimming). Severity tiers: blocking (rejection), caution (qualified), favorable (clean acceptance), neutral (not a real response), non_response (pending/absent).

En attente.label: En attente
En attente.description: No response yet — actor has not replied.

Validé avec observation.label: Validé avec observation
Validé avec observation.description: Approved with observations — conditions or remarks attached.

Suspendu.label: Suspendu
Suspendu.description: Suspended — response withheld pending further information.

Hors Mission.label: Hors Mission
Hors Mission.description: Outside this actor's mission scope — not a real response.

Sollicitation supplémentaire.label: Sollicitation supplémentaire
Sollicitation supplémentaire.description: Additional solicitation — not a substantive response.

_NONE_.label: (absent)
_NONE_.description: Blank or null value in the response column.

Blockage GEMO Non Justifié.label: Blockage GEMO Non Justifié
Blockage GEMO Non Justifié.description: Document hors mission BdC — blockage non justifié, reclassifié GEMO.
